title: Alta Vale Residential Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The NSW Building Commission made its first disciplinary decision against a builder for non-compliance with a building work rectification order, over a property at 291 George Street, Waterloo. The company Alta Vale Residential Pty Ltd was fined $50,000 for breaching its statutory warranty, and its director, Thomas Cull, was fined $40,000 and had his builder's licences cancelled, effective 1 May 2026. The company is barred from entering new building contracts until it complies with the order, and must file monthly progress reports; Alta Vale is seeking internal and potential NCAT review.
scope: Subject of the NSW Building Commission's first disciplinary decision against a builder for non-compliance with a rectification order; Company fined $50,000 for breach of statutory warranty; director fined $40,000 with licences cancelled; Barred from entering new building contracts until compliance is achieved
